recommendations.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure with TCFD Reporting
recommendations.description: Publish a comprehensive TCFD report including Scope 3 emissions to match or exceed SBI's ESG disclosure, attracting ESG-mandated foreign institutional investor inflows.
recommendations.profitability_link: Potential to attract ₹2000-3000 Cr in ESG fund inflows, increasing valuation premium by 5-10%
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India published TCFD report and attracted ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows

recommendations.title: Maintain and Improve NSE ESG Rating
recommendations.description: Implement quarterly internal ESG performance reviews and continuous improvement plans to sustain and improve NSE ESG rating, preventing loss of investor confidence.
recommendations.framework_section: BRSR:P6, SEBI Quarterly Corporate Governance Report
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoids potential 20-40 bps increase in cost of capital, saving ₹50-100 Cr annually

recommendations.title: Leverage ESG Rating for Investor Communications
recommendations.description: Launch targeted investor relations campaigns highlighting high NSE ESG rating to increase passive fund inflows and enhance company valuation.
recommendations.profitability_link: Expected valuation premium uplift of 5-7%, potentially increasing market cap by ₹1500-2000 Cr

recommendations.title: Prepare for ESRS Compliance for EU Operations
recommendations.description: Develop and implement ESRS-aligned sustainability reporting processes to ensure compliance with upcoming CSRD regulations for any EU-related operations or financing.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoids regulatory penalties and trading restrictions, potentially saving ₹30-50 Cr in fines and cost increases
